title: OpenRole | AI-Powered Job Application Platform
description: A comprehensive SaaS platform that automates the end-to-end job application lifecycle. OpenRole leverages AI to source high-relevance roles, tailor resumes to specific job descriptions, and execute automated applications across major ATS platforms, allowing candidates to scale their search while maintaining a personalized touch.
notes: Architected a robust authentication system featuring automated silent token refresh via Axios interceptors and synchronized Zustand state persistence. The platform includes a high-fidelity landing page with orchestrated Framer Motion animations and a real-time candidate dashboard with interactive onboarding tours and data visualization.

title: HRIS | Enterprise Human Resource Information System
description: A comprehensive, enterprise-grade HR management platform designed to digitize and automate the entire employee lifecycle. MercyHarbor HRIS streamlines complex multi-stage onboarding, digital document verification, and workforce management through a centralized dashboard, featuring real-time administrative analytics and granular role-based access control.
notes: Architected a resilient authentication and session management layer featuring automated token refresh cycles via Axios interceptors and persistent global state using Zustand. The platform manages high-density workforce data through optimized TanStack Table implementations and provides interactive administrative insights via Recharts visualization.

title: Leban Street | High-Performance E-commerce
description: A revenue-optimized food-tech engine that generated $30,000+ within 60 days of launch. Features a proprietary 'Smart Cart' system with multi-order batching and real-time supply chain visualization to maximize conversion rates.
notes: Optimized checkout flows and integrated location-based delivery fee automation to reduce cart abandonment by 25%.

title: Bukky Group | Excellence in Beauty, Fashion, Lifestyle & Empowerment
description: A premium multi-industry conglomerate spanning high-end beauty, haute couture, culinary excellence, and vocational education. The platform serves as a unified digital ecosystem for diverse brands including 3S The Label, Bukky Beauty World, and the Get Busy Foundation, bridging the gap between luxury services and social impact.
notes: Engineered a high-fidelity, multi-brand digital ecosystem featuring an immersive 'Logo Orbit' navigation system. The implementation focuses on premium brand storytelling through sophisticated typography (Cinzel, Playfair Display) and fluid motion design, while maintaining a robust state-managed architecture for cross-brand service discovery.
